---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
format:
  html:
    description: "Posts by Laszlo Szabo on transplant surgery, clinical data science, R programming, and building tools for better surgical decision-making."
---
